rationale.regulatory-compliance: Assurance cases explicitly operationalize adversarial-robustness duties under the EU AI Act.
rationale.rules-based-checks: Code assurance uses tests and vulnerability-detection libraries as grounded guardrails.
rationale.oversight-explanation: Graphical assurance cases provide human-readable reasoning and reporting for auditors.
rationale.framework: Layered guardrail and assurance-case architecture is reusable across LLM deployments.
rationale.general-ai: Framework covers both natural-language and code-language LLM applications.
rationale.steering: Input filtering, constraints, and paraphrasing substantively shape generation.
rationale.demote:context: The governed object is general-purpose LLM deployment, not specifically AI coding.
